/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags   -o ../bin/remisa_burn.so CMakeFiles/remisa_burn.dir/remisa_burn_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/remisa_burn.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/remisa_burn.dir/remisaburn.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libkwin.so.6.6.5 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.26.0 /usr/lib/libwayland-server.so /usr/lib/libKF6WindowSystem.so.6.26.0 /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libepoxy.so /usr/lib/libdrm.so /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.26.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.26.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
